ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "city_development_index" REAL /* Index of the city's development */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the employee (0: Male, 1: Female) */,
  "relevent_experience" INTEGER /* Relevance of the employee's experience */,
  "enrolled_university" INTEGER /* Whether the employee is enrolled in university */,
  "education_level" INTEGER /* Education level of the employee (1-5) */,
  "major_discipline" INTEGER /* Major discipline of the employee (0-5) */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the employee */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Size of the company */,
  "company_type" INTEGER /* Type of the company (1-3) */,
  "last_new_job" INTEGER /* Number of years since the last new job */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Number of training hours */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Target variable (0: Not looking for a job, 1: Looking for a job) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date when the employee joined the company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the employee */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of residence */,
  "is_manager" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is a manager */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program the employee is enrolled in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_education_level FOREIGN KEY ("education_level") REFERENCES education_levels ("education_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_type FOREIGN KEY ("company_type") REFERENCES companies ("company_type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_training_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_size FOREIGN KEY ("company_size") REFERENCES companies ("company_size")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., High School, Bachelor's, Master's) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_size" INTEGER /* Size of the company (1-3) */,
  "company_type" INTEGER /* Type of the company (1-3) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "training_hours" INTEGER /* Number of training hours */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the training program */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the training program */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "instructor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the permissions table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the system */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Gender of the employee (0: Male, 1: Female)
Whether the employee is enrolled in university
